name: Easy Blueberry Cobbler
recipeIngredient: Sugar substitute to equal 1 1/2 cups Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place blueberries in the bottom of a 10 x 6 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray; sprinkle with lemon juice.
2. Combine beaten egg, flour, and sugar substitute; stir until mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Sprinkle over blueberries.
4. Drizzle melted margarine over top.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes. Serve warm.
